title: Facebook Marketplace Seller Manager input
description: Management-first workflow for Facebook Marketplace sellers. Default mode produces a non-empty reply queue without credentials. Authenticated inbox and listing execution should be added on top of this management layer, not replace it.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Choose the workflow you want to run.

replyStyle.title: Reply style
replyStyle.description: Choose the default tone for generated seller replies.

replyTemplate.title: Custom reply template
replyTemplate.prefill: Hola {{buyerName}}, sigue disponible {{listingTitle}}. Si te encaja, te confirmo entrega hoy.

threads.title: Buyer threads
threads.description: Buyer thread rows used to build a conversation inventory or reply queue. Use this in conversation_inventory or build_reply_queue mode.

prefill.lastMessage: Lo recogeria manana, me lo dejas en 780?

listings.title: Seller listings
listings.description: Listing rows used to build an operations queue. Use this in listing_ops_plan mode.

cookiesJson.title: Facebook cookies JSON
cookiesJson.description: Paste exported facebook.com cookies JSON from Cookie-Editor or a similar browser tool. Used only in session_audit mode.
